title: corethrogyne filaginifolia var. viscidula
intro: Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. viscidula, also known as Sticky Corethrogyne, is a variety of shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and irritation. The health benefits of Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. viscidula include its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which can aid in wound healing and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and salves, often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
